data.name: ALTERNATE WORLDS
data.detailed_description:
ALTERNATE WORLDS

One devoted husband. One irresistible playboy. One life-shattering choice every sunrise.

In this visual novel, you were a legend, a world-famous fighter whose name echoed in stadiums. Now, after a career-ending injury, you're a devoted family man. Your life is anchored by a loving, beautiful wife and the warmth of a home you’ve built together. It’s a good life. A real life.

But what if it’s not the only one?

Enter Your Alternate Life

Each night, you awaken as the man you could have been. Wildly successful, fiercely independent, and completely unattached. In this realm of neon nights and penthouse views, you are a master of your own fortune, free from all responsibility.

Here, your nights are filled with passion, adventure, and a rotating cast of stunning women, each with their own desires and secrets. This is a life of pure, unadulterated freedom. But is it the life you truly want?

The Ultimate Choice

As the lines between your two lives begin to blur, the stakes get higher. The connections you make in both worlds deepen, and the consequences of your actions ripple across realities.

  • Will you fight to preserve the family that grounds you? Return to the arms of your dedicated wife, whose love is the bedrock of your existence.

  • Or will you surrender to the intoxicating thrill of the unknown? Embrace a world of wealth, power, and endless pleasure, leaving your old life behind forever.

In Alternate World, every decision pushes you closer to a final, irreversible choice. This isn't just a story you watch; it's a life you must choose.

Features

A Gripping Dual Narrative: Live two vastly different lives, each packed with dramatic twists, and heart-pounding moments.

Complex, Realistic Characters: Interact with a diverse cast of multi-dimensional characters. Discover their secrets, win their hearts, or risk their wrath.

High-Quality Art & Animation: Immerse yourself in a visually stunning world, brought to life with beautifully rendered characters, evocative environments, and dynamic animations that make every scene pop.

Emotionally Charged Soundtrack: A powerful, adaptive score enhances every moment, from tender romance to high-stakes tension.

Meaningful Choices, Lasting Consequences: Your decisions shape relationships, unlock scenes, and steer the story toward multiple unique endings. Choose wisely.

For Mature Audiences: Explores complex adult themes of love, loyalty, temptation, and sacrifice. This is a story that isn't afraid to challenge you.

Which World Will You Call Home?

By day, a respected family man. By night, a single, wealthy bachelor living a life without limits. The fantasy is yours to explore, but the final choice will be your reality.

Prepare to question everything you thought you wanted.

Welcome to Alternate World, your new addiction.

data.short_description: Ever ask yourself "what if...?" Like, what if a single decision, a surprise event, or a simple stroke of luck could have changed the whole course of your life, putting you on a totally different track? In Alternate World, you don't have to ask anymore: you're gonna live it.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 簡體中文, 繁體中文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 俄文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or later.
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • 儲存空間: 8 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: Système d'exploitation et processeur 64 bits nécessaires
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 處理器: 64 bit Apple M1 or Intel Core M
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2, DirectX 9, OpenGL ES 2 or WebGL

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 20.04 or later.
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 compatible
  • 儲存空間: 8 GB 可用空間
linux_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: The Steam "soldier" runtime, or a similar Linux distribution. 32-bit ARM Linux is no longer supported.
